headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Motorola Solutions, Ubiquiti and Nokia
summary: Ubiquiti surges on strong earnings revisions and massive stock gains as 5G, cloud and IoT demand power wireless industry growth despite margin pressures.

headline: Motorola Solutions Extends Resilient, Mission-Critical Communications and AI with T-Satellite from T-Mobile
summary: CHICAGO, April 07, 2026--Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) and T-Mobile today announced a collaboration to bring satellite connectivity to Motorola Solutions' APX NEXT smart radios. The radios, designed to intelligently unify networks including land mobile radio (LMR), 5G and Wi-Fi, can now operate leveraging T-Priority from T-Mobile - bringing first responders more capacity and faster speeds. They can also access T-Satellite with Starlink’s low earth orbit (LEO) direct-to-cell satellite network fo
